fields.summary: Handle recovery of applications in case of auto-created leaf queue mapping
[Umbrella] Capacity Scheduler: Support Auto Creation of Leaf Queues While Doing Queue Mapping

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: CapacityScheduler application recovery should auto-create leaf queue if it doesnt exist. Also RMAppManager needs to set the queue-mapping placement context so that scheduler has necessary placement context to recreate the queue

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: RM startup failure on recovery after user deletion

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved
